task: Find photos related to Trinity in The Matrix Wiki community.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully searched Fandom for Trinity-related content in the Matrix Wiki community, switched to the Photos and Videos tab, then filtered to Photos Only. The final page state explicitly showed Matrix Wiki file results such as 'File:Trinity-matrix.jpg', 'File:Trinity.png', 'File:Trinity Matrix code.png', and others. The agent also extracted the corresponding Matrix Wiki file-page URLs and returned them, along with the direct search-results URL. This satisfies the task of finding photos related to Trinity in The Matrix Wiki community.
final_result_response:
I found Fandom “Photos Only” results for **Trinity** in the **Matrix Wiki** community. Top matches:

1. [File:Trinity-matrix.jpg](https://matrix.fandom.com/wiki/File:Trinity-matrix.jpg)
2. [File:Trinity.png](https://matrix.fandom.com/wiki/File:Trinity.png)

4. [File:Trinity and Neo.jpg](https://matrix.fandom.com/wiki/File:Trinity_and_Neo.jpg)
5. [File:Trinity in The Matrix Resurrections.jpg](https://matrix.fandom.com/wiki/File:Trinity_in_The_Matrix_Resurrections.jpg)
6. [File:Trinity's Appearance.jpg](https://matrix.fandom.com/wiki/File:Trinity%27s_Appearance.jpg)

Search results page: https://community.fandom.com/wiki/Special:Search?scope=cross-wiki&query=Trinity+Matrix+Wiki&ns%5B0%5D=6&filter=imageOnly
action_history: Opening Fandom: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.fandom.com/');
Searching Fandom for Trinity Matrix Wiki: await page.locator('e114').click();
Searching Fandom for Trinity Matrix Wiki: await page.locator('e3').fill('Trinity Matrix Wiki');
Searching Fandom for Trinity Matrix Wiki: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
Opening Photos and Videos results: await page.locator('e49').click();
Filtering to photos only: await page.locator('e41').click();
